content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_edge_skew
C: webhook_verify ‚àß abs(now-ts)>"300" ‚àß returns_"401" ‚àß valid_rejected
P: widen_skew ‚àß provider_only ‚àß min_fix ‚àß reg_test
V: boundary_ts ‚àß preserve_"401" ‚àß no_replay
A: tune_"300" ‚àß add_edge_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_grace_boundary
C: overdue‚áí"402" ‚àß grace="24h" ‚àß billing_mw ‚àß charge_loop
P: detect_overdue ‚àß apply_grace"24h" ‚àß gate_"402" ‚àß break_loop
V: no_loop ‚àß "402"_after_24h ‚àß reg_test_pass
A: min_fix_patch ‚àß add_reg_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide_arch
C: team="9" ‚àß ddl="12 weeks" ‚àß store="PostgreSQL" ‚àß compliance_ready
P: modular_monolith ‚àß bounded_contexts ‚àß single_db ‚àß extract_later
V: ship_on_time ‚àß audit_boundaries ‚àß low_ops_cost
A: choose_modular_monolith ‚àß isolate_modules ‚àß defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ship_default_arch
C: team="6" ‚àß ddl="9 weeks" ‚àß store="PostgreSQL" ‚àß async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ‚àß pt_mlops ‚àß postgres_queue ‚àß short_why
V: fits_6 ‚àß meets_9_weeks ‚àß pg_only
A: pick_sidecar ‚àß justify_brief

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: prevent_path_traversal
P: reject".." ‚àß resolve_normalize ‚àß enforce_base_prefix ‚àß whitelist_files
V: test"../etc/passwd" ‚àß assert_403 ‚àß path_within_baseDir
A: add_validator ‚àß add_tests ‚àß audit_download_handlers

[AUDIT]
Goal: prevent_path_traversal.
Plan: reject".." and resolve_normalize and enforce_base_prefix and whitelist_files.
Verify: test"../etc/passwd" and assert_403 and path_within_baseDir.
Answer target: add_validator and add_tests and audit_download_handlers.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review_sort_injection
C: "SELECT"‚àß"sort"‚àßreq.query.sort‚àßstring_concat
P: sql_injection‚àßunsanitized_input‚àßorder_by_exploit
V: whitelist_columns‚àßparameterize‚àßreject_invalid
A: pentest_payloads‚àßlog_query_errors

[AUDIT]
Goal: review_sort_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and req.query.sort and string_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and unsanitized_input and order_by_exploit.
Verify: whitelist_columns and parameterize and reject_invalid.
Answer target: pentest_payloads and log_query_errors.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: "async"‚àß"await"‚àß"next(err)"‚àßminimal_change
P: load_batch‚àßdb.fetchRows‚àßapply_rules‚àßdb.save>emit_metrics
V: order_preserved‚àßdb_err="next(err)"‚àßasync_await
A: wrap_async‚àßawait_calls‚àßcatch‚Üínext(err)

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ‚àß "await" ‚àß "next(err)" ‚àß minimal_change
V: preserve_order ‚àß no_behavior_change ‚àß async_await
A: rewrite_fn ‚àß wrap_try_catch ‚àß await_each_step

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Verify: preserve_order and no_behavior_change and async/await.
Answer target: rewrite_fn and wrap_try_catch and await_each_step.
